title: PlannerBucket
description: Represents a bucket (custom column) for tasks in a plan in Microsoft 365. It is contained in a plannerPlan and can have a collection of plannerTasks.

@odata.etag.description: The ETag of the resource, used for concurrency control

id.description: The unique identifier for the bucket. 28 characters long and case-sensitive.

planId.description: Plan ID to which the bucket belongs

orderHint.description: Hint used to order buckets in a list view
